old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-sl32.4","title":"Heltec V3 6LBR: testing and validation","description":"Add tests for WiFi backhaul border router on Heltec V3: unit tests for prefix delegation, integration tests in mesh-sim or Renode with WiFi emulation (if possible), hardware test procedure in docs/bench-operations.md, interop with Rust lichen-gateway.
